_inspectorSnowReport.Report:
3/10 2:31PM - Today was nothing short of glorious, with sunshine, spring feels, and buttery turns! Temperatures begin to fall tomorrow as winter starts its comeback, with possible snow in the forecast this weekend. For your Wednesday, find your way down 93 open trails, 48 of which are set to be smoothed out overnight. We will be getting up on 9 lifts scheduled to spin at 9AM with possible delays due to high forecasted winds. Tune in first thing for your morning update! 

Looking ahead to the weekend, we’re excited for the 14th Annual 24 Hours of Stratton this Saturday. Ski and ride under the lights all night long while enjoying a weekend full of activities, all while raising funds for the Stratton Foundation, which supports Vermont children and families in need. Saturday will also feature the #Shred4Nate alpine slalom race, helping raise awareness for mental health and suicide prevention. Can’t wait to see you there!

Safety Tip: Always put the bar down while riding lifts. It’s the law! 

Upcoming Events
March 8-14: Women's Week Group Lessons
March 9-10: Women On Snow
March 14-15: 24 Hours of Stratton
March 20-22: HOMESICK
March 20: Lunar Laps
March 28: Annual Pond Skim
April 11-12: GATHER
To see our full list of events and more fun to come this summer, click HERE. And don't forget, we’re offering 50% off lift tickets every Wednesday and Thursday this season. What are you waiting for? Book now!

Starting March 1, jump into Stratton's Ikon Pass Spring Rewards Challenge. The more you scan, the more you win, and we're giving away tons of prizes all month long. You could score summer concert tickets with a night of lodging, a 26/27 Ikon Pass, and even more prizes! Scan your Ikon Pass at Stratton March 1-31 and start stacking the perks. Click here to learn more about the Ikon Pass Holder Spring Rewards Challenge.

Reliable cars are the name of the game; that is why we trust Oliver Subaru and Ford. Made for all seasons and all families, check out Oliver Ford and Oliver Subaru for year-round reliability!

Stay and relish the Green Mountains! Stratton Real Estate is here to help with all your real estate needs. Make your sweet escape a reality.
